confidence_rationale: Loop placement appears accurate from available camera angles, but precise mm measurement of deviation is difficult to assess. Task completion is clearly visible and time estimation is reliable from frame sequence.
cannot_determine: Exact mm deviation from marked line due to camera angle limitations
Whether tail was actually cut versus just positioned
technique_summary: Excellent expert-level performance with very efficient time (25s vs 20-40s expert benchmark). Clean loop deployment and placement with no visible penalties.
strengths: Very fast completion time in expert range
Accurate loop placement at marked line
improvement_suggestions: Performance already at expert level with minimal room for improvement
